synthesis.driver: Trump's threats of strikes on Iran escalated war-risk premium, lifting Brent $3.26 despite oversupply.
synthesis.based_on: Dubai Cuts Deal For New Port to Bypass Strait of Hormuz

takes.dubai cuts deal for new port to bypass s: Potential Hormuz bypass weakens long-term supply disruption fears, limiting price spikes.
takes.trump says us will destroy a bridge or p: US retaliation threats escalate tension, pushing war premium and prices higher.
takes.global oil price jumps as war threats in: Intensified war threats directly bolster Brent as traders price in disruption risk.
takes.analysis iran war energy shock hits the: Energy shock narrative reinforces upward pressure on oil prices from geopolitical risks.
takes.us to strike iran for every attack on sh: Trump's vow of retaliation amplifies Hormuz risk, driving war premium and prices up.
